changes.description: User registration and login with Sanctum cookie-based authentication
Product catalog with breed, category, and price filtering and sorting
Product detail pages with image gallery and rooster specifications
Category browsing with dedicated category pages
Shopping cart with add, update quantity, and remove functionality
Checkout flow with shipping address selection and order placement
Order history and order detail pages
Admin panel for product, category, and order management
Role-based access control with admin role
Security headers, rate limiting, and XSS protection
